name: PercentIOLimit
definition: Shows how close a General Purpose EFS file system is to reaching its I/O limit. Primary headroom signal when available.
absence_means: File system is not General Purpose or exporter omitted the metric
cardinality_footguns: Safe; group by file system only

name: BurstCreditBalance
definition: Burst credits available to a bursting-mode file system. Falling balance means future throughput pressure even if current traffic still looks acceptable.
absence_means: File system is not using Bursting throughput or exporter omitted the metric

name: PermittedThroughput
definition: Maximum throughput the file system can currently drive. Use as the denominator for throughput utilization and to distinguish healthy load from throughput ceilings.
absence_means: Exporter gap or file system missing from inventory

name: MeteredIOBytes
definition: Throughput-accounted bytes for all operations after EFS read-discount rules. Best numerator for throughput utilization math.
absence_means: File system is idle or exporter omitted the metric

name: TotalIOBytes
definition: Actual bytes processed for all EFS operations without read discounts. Useful for true workload volume and discount-ratio math.
absence_means: File system is idle or exporter omitted the metric

name: MetadataIOBytes
definition: Actual bytes consumed by metadata operations. High values often indicate namespace or tiny-file pressure.
absence_means: No metadata-heavy operations during the period

name: MetadataReadIOBytes
definition: Actual bytes consumed by metadata read operations such as namespace scans and stats.
absence_means: No metadata reads during the period

name: MetadataWriteIOBytes
definition: Actual bytes consumed by metadata write operations such as creates
variants: No metadata writes during the period

name: ClientConnections
definition: Number of client connections to a file system. Good blast-radius signal for fleet fanout and mount churn.
absence_means: No connected clients or exporter omitted the metric
cardinality_footguns: Safe for file system; do not infer per-host health from this alone

name: StorageBytes
definition: File system size across storage classes. Primary storage and cost proxy. Emitted every 15 minutes rather than every minute.
absence_means: Storage-class dimension missing or file system missing from inventory
cardinality_footguns: Safe on file system id and storageclass

name: DataReadIOBytes
definition: MISSING — documented by AWS but not present in Tsuga for this workspace. Read/write demand must be inferred from TotalIOBytes
cardinality_footguns: Metric not exported by collector or omitted from workspace

name: DataWriteIOBytes
definition: MISSING — documented by AWS but not present in Tsuga for this workspace. Write-heavy behavior must be inferred indirectly because the direct write series is absent.
optional_context_fields: Metric not exported by collector or omitted from workspace

name: TimeSinceLastSync
definition: MISSING — documented by AWS but not present in Tsuga for this workspace. Replication freshness must remain gated until the metric appears.
optional_context_fields: Replication not configured or metric not exported

name: NOT_APPLICABLE
definition: EFS does not expose a direct spend metric. Use StorageBytes by storage class as the primary cost proxy and MeteredIOBytes as a throughput-activity proxy. Detailed billing still belongs in AWS Cost Explorer and pricing views.
